Our Story

Built for the Mayo–Whitehorse Route

A practical local freight company focused on doing one route well: dependable weekend freight between Mayo and Whitehorse.

Why We Started

40 Mile Supply was created to solve a practical problem: getting freight between Mayo and Whitehorse on a dependable schedule. In the North, timing matters. A missed part, delayed order, or late supplier pickup can affect stores, projects, maintenance work, and day-to-day operations.

We are not a national courier, an e-commerce shop, or a moving company. We are a route-focused local freight service — weekend runs, Whitehorse pickups, and practical delivery support for businesses, contractors, organizations, and local customers.

Clear communication and straightforward coordination are at the centre of what we do. You tell us what needs to move; we work with you on timing and details.

Mayo, Yukon
Based Here
Weekend Route
Scheduled Service
Whitehorse Link
Supply Connection
Built for Growth
Expanding With You
What We Stand For

Our Values

Principles that guide how we run freight and work with customers.

Dependability First

We set clear expectations and follow through. When we say we're running, we run. Communication is straightforward so you can plan.

Local Knowledge Matters

We know the Mayo–Whitehorse corridor. That knowledge shapes how we schedule, coordinate pickups, and handle the details that matter on this route.

Straightforward Service

No corporate jargon, no overpromising. We tell you what we can do, how it works, and what to expect. Quote-based freight coordination, plain and simple.

Where We Operate

Mayo, Whitehorse & the Silver Trail

We focus on the Mayo–Whitehorse route and the Silver Trail corridor. Need something outside this area? Contact us — we may still be able to help.

Mayo, Yukon
Whitehorse, Yukon
Silver Trail corridor

Ready to move freight?

Get in touch for a quote or to ask about upcoming weekend runs.

40 Mile Supply

40 Mile Supply is a Mayo-based freight service offering dependable weekend runs between Mayo and Whitehorse for supplies, pickups, project freight, and practical local delivery support.

  • Weekend Freight Runs
  • Whitehorse Pickups
  • Business Restock
  • Contractor & Project Freight
